results.title: Lionel Messi to Start from Bench in Argentina's Final Group Stage Match
results.description: Lionel Messi will not start in Argentina's final group stage match against Jordan, as confirmed by coach Lionel Scaloni. However, he is expected to play as a substitute. Argentina has already secured the top spot in Group J and aims to continue their successful campaign after impressive victories. Messi's contributions have been pivotal, making him the tournament's top scorer. The team looks to defend their title and create history in the upcoming matches.

results.title: Sonia slams Modi govt's 'stony silence' on Gaza 'genocide', says it can't be explained rationally or morally
results.description: Sonia Gandhi strongly criticised the Modi government's silence on the "Gaza genocide," deeming it morally reprehensible and detrimental to India's national interest. She argues that India has alienated historical allies and global public opinion, allowing Pakistan to gain influence. Gandhi highlights UN reports detailing alleged Israeli actions and the tragic case of Hind Rajab, urging India to uphold humanitarian values and reclaim its independent foreign policy.

results.title: Who in Tennessee’s Children’s Special Services program could be reported?
results.description: As a Davidson County judge has temporarily blocked Tennessee from reporting information about people who get services from Children’s Special Services.

results.title: World : Senegal Pulverise 10-man Iraq 5-0 For Shot At Place In Next Round Of World Cup
results.description: ISTANBUL, June 27 (Bernama-Anadolu) -- Senegal pulverised a 10-man Iraq team 5-0 on Friday in their final Group I match to throw their hat in the ring for the next round of the 2026 FIFA World Cup at Toronto Stadium in Canada.

results.title: Senegal coach Pape Bouna Thiaw says team must improve despite 5-0 World Cup win
results.description: Despite a 5-0 victory over Iraq, Senegal coach Pape Bouna Thiaw insists the team must improve as they await qualification for the FIFA World Cup knockout stage.
